_comment: Deploy config for the shared `turnwrk` Firebase project (TURNWRK-220). Canonical Firestore rules/indexes + Storage rules live in firebase/ and are vendored into every consumer's packages/shared/firebase/ for emulator use. Prod deploys run from .github/workflows/deploy-firebase.yml (owner-triggered workflow_dispatch) or `firebase deploy` from this repo — never from the app repos.
